# Wellbore Integrity

**Summary**: The ability of a well to contain fluids and pressures safely.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2019-ahmed|Ahmed, 2019]] addressed well integrity by predicting zones where fluid loss could lead to kicks or blowouts.

## Scientific Context

- [[2019-ahmed|Ahmed, 2019]] Critical for preventing blowouts in HTPH wells.
